hyperedges.label: Churn Prediction to Email Pipeline
hyperedges.description: The end-to-end agent pipeline: Random Forest predicts churn → SHAP explains top 3 risk factors → Groq LLM drafts personalized retention email → Human approves/rejects → Gmail SMTP sends

hyperedges.label: LangGraph Conditional Risk Routing Architecture
hyperedges.source_location: Why LangGraph and Why separate nodes sections
hyperedges.description: LangGraph provides conditional branching via explicit graph nodes; configurable thresholds determine routing; separate nodes per risk level enable extensibility — all forming the agent's routing architecture

hyperedges.label: Human Oversight and Audit Compliance Pattern
hyperedges.description: Human-in-the-loop approval gates irreversible email actions, and every human decision (approve/reject) is logged to CSV audit trail — forming the production safety and compliance pattern

hyperedges.label: Human Oversight and Audit Compliance Pattern
